query:
UPDATE variant_pricing
SET 
  sellingPriceFobL1 = ROUND(30 + (RAND() * 120), 2),
  sellingPriceRmbIncTax = ROUND(200 + (RAND() * 800), 2)
WHERE isCurrent = 1;
